notable: FutureWarning: Downcasting on .fillna/.ffill/.bfill deprecated (261 occurrences in test_param_optimizer_de.py)

issues.description: Test count increased from baseline 5187 to 5366 (+179). All new tests pass.
313 warnings emitted — mostly FutureWarning (pandas downcasting) and DeprecationWarning (fork in multithread). Should be addressed before pandas 3.0.
Coverage at 54% overall. Many strategy variant files (roc_ema_volume_*.py) have 0% coverage — appear to be dead/untested clones.
Possibly unused imports in recently changed files: 'pathlib' and 'traceback' in scripts/batch_wf_validate_winners.py.
UserWarning about metric 'start' raising exception in param_optimizer.py:207 — non-fatal but worth investigating.

recommendations: Address pandas FutureWarning about fillna downcasting by adding .infer_objects(copy=False) or setting pd.set_option('future.no_silent_downcasting', True) in test_param_optimizer_de.py.
Consider using multiprocessing start method 'spawn' instead of 'fork' in test_parallel.py to eliminate DeprecationWarning.
Evaluate 0% coverage strategy variant files (roc_ema_volume_*.py) — either add tests or remove if they are superseded dead code.
Investigate the 'Metric start raised exception' warning in param_optimizer.py:207.
Remove unused imports (pathlib, traceback) from scripts/batch_wf_validate_winners.py.
Clean up temporary validation scripts (validation_probe.py, verify_validation.py) if no longer needed.
